package rulecoverage

func NegativeOffsetPaginationOnLargeTable() string {
    ruleID := "offset_pagination_on_large_table"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Request-path GORM Find(...) chains that page with Offset(...), which often scales poorly on large lists."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
